description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, angular headband and large, circular ear cups. The ear cups feature a prominent logo on the exterior, likely indicating the brand, and are surrounded by thick, cushioned padding for comfort. The headband is reinforced with a double-arched structure, providing both durability and a modern aesthetic. Visible wiring connects the ear cups, suggesting a wired connection for audio input. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with a matte and slightly textured finish on the plastic and metal components. The headphones appear to be designed for immersive audio experiences, suitable for both casual and professional urban use.
description: A pair of large, over-ear headphones with a sturdy, angular headband and thickly padded ear cups, featuring a visible brand logo and a modern, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both ear cups with visible brand logos and the full headband structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cups and the layered construction of the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the deep, cushioned interiors of the ear cups and the underside of the headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the ear cups and headband.
